description_long: This is a tan, open-top military-style car with a rugged, utilitarian design, featuring exposed seating and minimal body panels. The vehicle has four large, black wheels with pronounced fenders and a robust, angular front bumper for protection. Along the sides, there are visible jerry cans and storage compartments, suggesting off-road or expedition use. The interior consists of three rows of bench seats, each with green seatbacks, and the rear section includes a large, rectangular storage box. The car's exterior is primarily matte tan with some brown and red accents, and the overall build is boxy and functional. The headlights are round and mounted on the front, while the rear is flat with no visible taillights or license plate.
description: A tan, open-top military-style car with exposed bench seating, rugged wheels, and utilitarian storage features. The design is boxy and functional, with round headlights and a robust front bumper.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the angular front bumper, round headlights, and three rows of exposed bench seats.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the flat rear, large storage box, and side-mounted jerry can.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the open seating arrangement, rear storage, and side compartments.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the front grille, headlights, and the arrangement of the bench seats.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights mounted on the front
